event_blocks.summary: The game begins with participants in white outfits and yellow tracksuits engaging in a passing challenge, where they must correctly identify and chant phrases like "这是一个太阳伞" (This is a parasol) while passing an object. The male announcer explains the rules: three people on stools, passing items, and completing at least three rounds with the correct chant. The challenge requires all eight members to participate. On-screen text graphics, including a cartoon director character, highlight elements like '质疑' (doubt) and '传递物品' (passing items). Participants, including a woman with dark hair ('孟指导上线' - Meng Director Online) and a woman with blonde hair and a bow ('Ziyi'), comment on the game's abstract and difficult nature, comparing it to other challenges. The game evolves to involve identifying food items like '莲藕汤' (lotus root soup), '鸭脖子' (duck neck), and '小龙虾' (little lobster), with participants repeatedly asking "是什么?" (What is it?) and misidentifying the items, leading to widespread laughter. A split-screen comparison visually demonstrates the messiness of the challenge on participants' hands. The game mechanics involve passing the '莲藕汤' and a red chili pepper, with a rapid chant of "这是一个莲藕汤, 是什么, 莲藕汤, 是什么?" or variations like "小葫芦汤." The Man in white shirt (center focus) and Li Chen are central to the comedic exchanges, reacting with exaggerated distress and amusement. The segment concludes with the announcement of the "第一组" (First group) and an energetic, upbeat background music track.

Cartoon Director Character.description: An animated figure labeled '导演' (director), depicted with flames and holding a fan, appearing in a green background with the text '质疑' (doubt), symbolizing a humorous critique.

Woman with blonde hair and bow.description: Wearing a white outfit with a large bow in her hair, she is seated next to the center table, reacting with amusement and laughing heartily at the man's exaggerated reactions during the game, her face shown in close-up to highlight her enjoyment; her distinct laughter is heard, and she exclaims "可以了，可以了!" (Okay, okay!) towards the end of the segment.

Participants in yellow tracksuits.description: Three individuals in matching yellow tracksuits seated around a small table, engaged in a passing game with a small white object, actively chanting in unison phrases like '这是一个太阳伞' (This is a parasol), '这是一个苍蝇拍' (This is a fly swatter), '这是一个苍蝇球' (This is a fly ball), and '这是一个苍蝇伞' (This is a fly umbrella), accompanied by laughter and playful sounds.

On-screen Text Graphics.description: Animated Chinese text such as '小葫芦汤' (Little Gourd Soup), '莲藕汤' (Lotus Root Soup), and '这是一个xiu~' (This is a xiu~), used to narrate and emphasize the game and commentary, directly correlating with the rapid chanting of the soup names and distinct "xiu~" sound effects heard during the passing game.

Participants in white outfits.description: A group of individuals in white clothing seated at tables in the background, eating and reacting to the game with amusement; some stand and move around, engaging in playful interactions, contributing to the lively atmosphere with their laughter and participation in the collective chanting.

Woman with dark hair.description: Wearing a white jacket with a name tag, she is actively speaking and gesturing, appearing to lead the commentary or critique, with on-screen text labeling her as '孟指导上线' (Meng Director Online). She expresses her enjoyment of the game, stating in Chinese, '这个游戏很高级' (this game is very advanced).

Man in white shirt (center focus).description: A man in a white shirt seated at the center table, reacting with exaggerated expressions of discomfort and laughter as he receives the red chili pepper during the passing game; his hands are shown in close-up and overhead shots, emphasizing his involvement in the challenge, and he actively participates in the rapid, repetitive chanting of "莲藕汤" and "小葫芦汤" with other male voices.

Red Chili Pepper.description: A small, bright red chili pepper placed on the wooden board, used as part of the game or challenge, passed between participants, causing comedic reactions when handled by the man in the center.

White Bowl.description: A small white bowl containing a golden-brown food item, labeled as '莲藕汤' (lotus root soup), central to the passing game and interaction, being passed between participants with animated gestures.

Man with name tag '李晨'.description: A man in a white shirt with a visible name tag '李晨' (Li Chen), seated at the center table, actively participating in the passing game by handing over the white bowl and red chili pepper, laughing and engaging with the central figure, and contributing to the energetic, repetitive chanting.

Split-Screen Comparison.description: A visual graphic showing two overhead views of the man in the center’s hands before and after the game, labeled '玩之前' (Before Playing) and '玩之后' (After Playing), highlighting the messiness and physical impact of the challenge.

raw_segments: The segment opens with a wide shot of a bright, colorful studio set designed like a casual dining area, where a group of participants in white outfits are seated at tables, conversing and eating. A clear male announcer's voice introduces the game, explaining, "The task is called, this is a what what what. Three people need to sit on stools, and there are three items. We will pass it from the first person to the next person. In the correct rhythm, say the correct chant, at least three rounds must be passed for the challenge to be considered complete." The scene then cuts to a close-up of three participants in matching yellow tracksuits, labeled 1, 2, and 3, seated around a small table. They are actively engaged in the game, passing a small white object while chanting in unison, "这是一个太阳伞" (This is a parasol), then "这是一个苍蝇拍" (This is a fly swatter), "这是一个苍蝇球" (This is a fly ball), and "这是一个苍蝇伞" (This is a fly umbrella), accompanied by laughter and playful sounds. On-screen text confirms they are '传递物品' (passing items) and '说对口令' (say the correct chant). The camera alternates between close-ups of their playful expressions and wider shots showing the amused reactions of the participants in white outfits. The male announcer's voice returns to add, "All eight members, every member must participate for the challenge to be considered complete." The atmosphere remains lighthearted and comedic, enhanced by animated graphics, including a cartoon director character with flames and text like '质疑' (doubt). A woman with dark hair, identified by on-screen text as '孟指导上线' (Meng Director Online), humorously questions, "Who invented this game?" Another male voice comments, "It's so abstract." The woman with blonde hair and a large bow in her hair playfully adds, "This game doesn't feel as good as the lollipop and soap game." Further male voices chime in with surprise and critique, "Wow, this is a tricky game," and expressing disbelief, "Oh my god, 13 episodes, no one has ever dared to do this." The woman with dark hair continues her commentary, comparing the game to others, "If you search for 'lollipop' and 'soap' on that app, that feeling is better than this..." The segment concludes with her leading the commentary, reinforcing the playful, critical tone.

The segment opens with close-ups of the Woman with dark hair and the Woman with blonde hair and bow, both seated and reacting with expressive faces of surprise, amusement, and engagement to a lively game or discussion. A male voice comments on the game being “more advanced,” while a female voice notes, “He said this game is low-level,” followed by a playful male threat, “You're done. I'll starve you immediately.” The scene transitions to a wider shot, revealing a group of Participants in white outfits seated at tables in a brightly lit studio with a blue and white 'Keep Running' themed set, adorned with flowers and cartoon graphics. The atmosphere is playful and energetic, filled with laughter and interaction. The Woman with dark hair, labeled '孟指导上线' (Meng Director Online), takes a leading role, gesturing animatedly as she speaks, and is heard playfully defending herself, stating, “I didn't say that game was bad, stop trying to trick people.” The Woman with blonde hair and bow reacts with laughter and occasional commentary, making a brief, somewhat ambiguous comment. Participants in white outfits are seen eating and reacting, with some standing and moving around, indicating a dynamic, interactive segment. On-screen text graphics like '好喝' (delicious) and '安慕希' (a yogurt brand) appear intermittently. A male voice announces, “If we're okay, we can send out the three members of the first team to battle,” prompting eager volunteers from the participants, who exclaim, “I'll go first!” and “I'm here!” A humorous moment unfolds as a participant stands and moves across the set, prompting reactions and laughter from others, including a Man in a white shirt who appears to be the focus of a joke or challenge, with a male voice explaining, “Teasing you, just teasing you.” The segment culminates with a male voice announcing the first round's challenge: passing “Wuhan delicacies,” specifically “lotus root soup, duck neck, and small...” as blurred transitions show text overlays like '一根鸭脖子' (a duck neck) and '一只小龙虾' (a lobster), setting up a food-related game.

The video segment opens with a close-up of three food items—a bowl of lotus root soup, a duck neck, and a lobster—displayed on a wooden board, setting up a game or challenge. A male voice is heard identifying "龙虾" (lobster), followed by a brief laugh. The scene transitions to a studio setting with a light blue backdrop featuring the 'Keep Running' logo and cartoon elements. At the center, a man in a white shirt (center focus) is seated between a woman with dark hair in a white jacket and another man in a white shirt. A male voice asks, "可以先试一下吗?" (Can I try it first?), to which another male voice firmly replies, "不用试" (No need to try), a phrase repeated twice. They are engaged in a playful exchange, passing a small white bowl, labeled '莲藕汤' (lotus root soup), and a red object, possibly a chili pepper. A male voice initiates the game, stating, "我先一递，这是一个莲藕汤" (I'll pass it first, this is lotus root soup). The Woman with dark hair then declares, "这是一碗莲藕汤" (This is a bowl of lotus root soup), a phrase echoed by the Man in white shirt. The Woman with blonde hair and bow, identified by a male voice as 'Ziyi', frequently asks "是什么呀？" (What is it?), prompting a male voice to instruct, "不对，紫怡你要把它接过来" (Incorrect, Ziyi, you need to take it). Ziyi acknowledges with "啊，明白了" (Ah, I understand), and the game continues with participants repeatedly identifying the '莲藕汤' and passing the bowl. The Man in white shirt reacts with surprise and amusement, playfully exclaiming "不信不信" (Don't believe it, don't believe it!) twice, amidst laughter. The Woman with dark hair gestures animatedly, appearing to lead the interaction, with on-screen text like '咋还演上了' (Why are you acting now?) and '孟指导上线' (Meng Director Online) emphasizing her humorous critique. She challenges a male participant, asking, "你哪来的自信第一个上的？" (Where did you get the confidence to go first?). Ziyi then comments, "怎么看着那么简单，感觉有点难呢？" (Why does it look so simple, but it feels a bit difficult?), to which a male voice confidently replies, "我觉得挺简单的" (I think it's quite simple). Other participants in white outfits are visible in the background, some eating and others watching, with one standing and moving toward the central table. The lighthearted and comedic atmosphere is punctuated by a distinct gong sound and a whistle. The segment ends with the central trio still engaged in the passing game, the Woman with dark hair smiling broadly, and Ziyi continuing to laugh, as the '莲藕汤' identification game continues.

The video segment opens in a brightly lit studio set, designed as a casual dining space with blue and white decor and the 'Keep Running' logo. Participants in white outfits are seated at tables, with the on-screen text '正确动作演示' (Correct Action Demonstration) appearing. The atmosphere is immediately lighthearted, filled with upbeat background music and frequent laughter. A game unfolds around a red chili pepper placed on a wooden board, involving a small white bowl containing a golden-brown food item. A male voice identifies the contents as "这是一碗莲藕汤" (this is a bowl of lotus root soup). A man with a name tag '李晨' and another man in a V-neck collar are central to the playful challenge, passing the bowl. The game quickly devolves into a comedic exchange, with participants repeatedly asking "是什么?" (what is it?) and humorously misidentifying the contents as "鸭脖子" (duck neck) instead of "莲藕汤," eliciting loud laughter and exaggerated "Ahhh!" sounds from the group. A male voice exclaims, "这很难啊" (this is so hard), and playfully tells others to "小点声" (quiet down). The Woman with dark hair, labeled '孟指导上线' (Meng Director Online), gestures animatedly, leading commentary and expressing her enjoyment, stating, "这个游戏很高级" (this game is very advanced). The Woman with blonde hair and bow reacts with amusement, laughing alongside other participants who lean in and engage in mock competition. A male voice then explains the game's mechanics, detailing how participants must pass the "莲藕汤" to '哥' (Brother Chen) and then to '张真源', maintaining the cheerful and energetic tone throughout the segment.

The video segment opens with an upbeat background track as a group of participants in white outfits are seated at a table, engaged in a playful passing game involving a small white bowl and a red chili pepper. The central focus is on a man in a white shirt, who reacts with exaggerated expressions of discomfort and laughter as the items are passed to him. A male voice, likely a host, repeatedly identifies the bowl's contents as "莲藕汤" (lotus root soup), then comically switches to "鸭脖子" (duck neck) and later "小龙虾" (little lobster), prompting another male voice, identified as the Man with name tag '李晨', to repeatedly ask "是什么?" (What is it?). The Man in white shirt (center focus) vocally expresses his playful exasperation with phrases like "别着急" (Don't rush), "我会了" (I got it), and "这仨又回我这儿来了" (These three came back to me again), eliciting hearty laughter from the Woman with blonde hair and bow and other participants. On-screen text like '传递顺序' (Passing Order) guides the game, while '李晨' actively participates, passing the items with animated gestures and joking about sending the "小龙虾哥" (little lobster brother). A split-screen comparison labeled '玩之前' (Before Playing) and '玩之后' (After Playing) visually highlights the messiness of the activity on the man’s hands. The lighthearted and comedic atmosphere is underscored by continuous laughter and playful banter, with the Man in white shirt (center focus) humorously asking "你又不歇会儿" (Why don't you take a break?). The scene expands to a wider view, showing more participants in white outfits in the background, some standing and moving, all contributing to the dynamic and fun environment, with 'Keep Running' and '安慕希' (Amul) branding visible.

The segment opens in a brightly lit studio, resembling a casual dining area, adorned with the 'Keep Running' logo and '安慕希 爆珠酸奶' promotional graphics. Multiple participants in white outfits are seated, but the focus quickly narrows to a central table where three men are engaged in a playful passing game. A man in the center, reacting with exaggerated discomfort and laughter, becomes the focal point as a small white bowl and a red chili pepper are passed to him. His voice is heard exclaiming '完蛋了!' (I'm done for!) and misidentifying the bowl's contents, saying, '我拿那莲藕汤就说小龙虾,' (I took that lotus root soup and said it was crayfish) followed by '可是一看又不是小龙虾.' (But then I saw it wasn't crayfish.) The man with the name tag '李晨' actively participates, passing the items with animated gestures, contributing to the excited male voices heard throughout the game. The game involves a rapid-fire call-and-response, with multiple male voices chanting, '这是一碗莲藕汤' (This is a bowl of lotus root soup) and '是什么?' (What is it?), then '莲藕汤.' This chant evolves, referencing on-screen text like '小葫芦汤' (Little Gourd Soup) and '这是一个小火锅' (This is a small hot pot), leading to bursts of collective laughter from the participants. A woman with blonde hair and a bow, seated nearby, laughs heartily at the man's reactions, her amusement clearly audible. Other participants in white outfits in the background watch, react with amusement, and join in the collective laughter and chanting. The game's rules are clarified by a male voice stating, '不可以, 你们要传递至少三圈以上, 就得转头.' (No, you have to pass it at least three rounds, then you have to turn your head.) The atmosphere remains lively and humorous, with participants standing, moving, and engaging playfully as the game continues, the man in the center grimacing and laughing, clearly enjoying the challenge. The segment concludes with the ongoing game, underscored by the comedic on-screen text '这是一个xiu~' and the continued chanting.

The video segment opens with a lively game involving three men, including the Man in white shirt (center focus) and Li Chen, seated around a small wooden table in a brightly lit studio. They are engaged in a fast-paced passing game involving a small white bowl labeled '莲藕汤' and a bright red chili pepper, accompanied by an incredibly rapid, repetitive chant of "这是一个莲藕汤 (This is a lotus root soup), 是什么 (What is it?), 莲藕汤 (Lotus Root Soup), 是什么 (What is it?)" or "小葫芦汤," sung by multiple male voices. Distinct "xiu~" sound effects punctuate the rapid passing of items, aligning with on-screen text like '这是一个xiu~'. The Man in white shirt reacts with exaggerated mock distress and amusement as he receives the chili, drawing hearty laughter from Li Chen and the other participant. The Woman with blonde hair and bow watches with wide-eyed amusement, her prominent laughter heard throughout, and she exclaims "可以了，可以了!" (Okay, okay!) towards the end of the intense passing. Overhead shots emphasize the circular motion of the game, while other Participants in white outfits in the background contribute to the energetic atmosphere with their laughter and reactions. The game culminates with excited male exclamations and a "ding" sound effect, followed by a male voice announcing "第一组" (First group). An energetic, upbeat background music track underscores the entire humorous and chaotic scene, which also features a Split-Screen Comparison graphic highlighting the messiness of the challenge on the man's hands.

event_blocks.summary: In a brightly lit studio adorned with a 'Keep Running' logo, participants in white outfits engaged in a lively passing game around wooden tables, featuring props like a bowl of hot dry noodles, a plush sword labeled '一把勾践剑', and a boiled egg. The Man in the white shirt at the center reacted with exaggerated discomfort and laughter, particularly after receiving a red chili pepper, with close-ups highlighting his expressive face and hands. The Woman with dark hair, identified as '孟指导上线', actively led the commentary, critiquing the game's pace and participants' impatience, while the Man with name tag '李晨' participated by handing over items and calling out names. The game involved rapid call-and-response, with participants chanting item names like '勾践剑!', '热干面!', and '水煮蛋!', interspersed with '是什么?' (What is it?). On-screen text graphics such as '挑战成功' (Challenge Successful) and '惊不惊喜' (Surprised or not?) enhanced the comedic tone. The Woman with blonde hair and bow laughed heartily at the reactions. A split-screen comparison visually emphasized the messy outcome on the man’s hands, labeled '玩之前' (Before Playing) and '玩之后' (After Playing), reinforcing the energetic and humorous atmosphere of the show.

Boiled Egg.description: A plain white boiled egg labeled '一颗水煮蛋' (a boiled egg), positioned next to the plush sword and noodle bowl, serving as a simple yet comedic game element, and introduced into the rapid-fire call-and-response game as "水煮蛋" in the latter half of the minute.

Bowl of Hot Dry Noodles.description: A small white bowl with red and yellow trim, filled with noodles and green toppings, labeled '一碗热干面' (a bowl of hot dry noodles), central to the game setup and frequently named aloud as "热干面" during the fast-paced call-and-response game.

Man in white shirt (center focus).description: A man in a white shirt seated at the center table, reacting with exaggerated expressions of discomfort and laughter as he receives the red chili pepper during the passing game; his hands are shown in close-up and overhead shots, emphasizing his involvement in the challenge, with his non-verbal reactions being a key comedic element.

Woman with blonde hair and bow.description: Wearing a white outfit with a large bow in her hair, she is seated next to the center table, reacting with amusement and laughing heartily at the man's exaggerated reactions during the game, her hearty laughter contributing to the lively background sounds.

On-screen Text Graphics.description: Animated Chinese text such as '热干面' (hot dry noodles), '勾践剑' (sword of Goujian), '水煮蛋' (boiled egg), and '渐入佳境' (entering the best state), used to narrate and emphasize the game and commentary, directly corresponding to the items being shouted aloud by the participants.

Participants in white outfits.description: A group of individuals in white clothing seated at tables in the background, eating and reacting to the game with amusement; some stand and move around, engaging in playful interactions, contributing to the lively atmosphere.

Plush Sword.description: A brown and beige checkered plush sword labeled '一把勾践剑' (a sword of Goujian), placed on the table as part of the game's symbolic items, adding a humorous historical reference, and frequently named aloud as "勾践剑" during the fast-paced call-and-response game.

Woman with dark hair.description: Wearing a white jacket with a name tag, she is actively speaking and gesturing, appearing to lead the commentary or critique, with on-screen text labeling her as '孟指导上线' (Meng Director Online). She is heard remarking, "这是我玩过最高端的游戏。我都有点读不明白。" (This is the most high-end game I've ever played. I'm a bit confused.), and later asking for a slower pace, "你慢一点. 我这个有点读不明白，你慢一点."

Split-Screen Comparison.description: A visual graphic showing two overhead views of the man in the center’s hands before and after the game, labeled '玩之前' (Before Playing) and '玩之后' (After Playing), highlighting the messiness and physical impact of the challenge.

Man with name tag '李晨'.description: A man in a white shirt with a visible name tag '李晨' (Li Chen), seated at the center table, actively participating in the passing game by handing over the white bowl and red chili pepper, laughing and engaging with the central figure. He is likely one of the male voices participating in the rapid-fire call-and-response game, possibly counting down "3, 2, 1, 走!" and shouting item names.

Red Chili Pepper.description: A small, bright red chili pepper placed on the wooden board, used as part of the game or challenge, passed between participants, causing comedic reactions when handled by the man in the center, though not explicitly named in the rapid-fire audio.

White Bowl.description: A small white bowl containing a golden-brown food item, labeled as '莲藕汤' (lotus root soup), central to the passing game and interaction, being passed between participants with animated gestures.

Cartoon Director Character.description: An animated figure labeled '导演' (director), depicted with flames and holding a fan, appearing in a green background with the text '质疑' (doubt), symbolizing a humorous critique.

raw_segments: The video segment opens in a brightly lit studio, adorned with blue and white tones and a large 'Keep Running' logo, where participants in white outfits are seated at wooden tables, engaged in a lively game. An energetic atmosphere is palpable, filled with laughter and animated gestures. A male voice exclaims "挑战成功!" (Challenge Successful!), followed by a dramatic, exaggerated "Ahhh!" from the man in the white shirt at the center, who reacts with intense discomfort, possibly to a red chili pepper, leaning back and laughing as close-ups emphasize his expressive face and hands. Playful, upbeat background music underscores the scene. Another male voice comments "哎呀, 好累啊" (Oh, so tired), while others discuss the game's pace, with one saying "上道之后就快了" (Once you get the hang of it, it's fast). The Woman with dark hair, labeled '孟指导上线', is actively speaking and gesturing, and her clear, authoritative voice is heard announcing, "接下来, 你挑战的物品, 我们会为你们更换成 一把勾践剑, 一碗热干面, 一颗水煮蛋" (Next, the items for your challenge, we will replace them with a Goujian sword, a bowl of hot dry noodles, a boiled egg), confirming her role as a host. The Woman with blonde hair and bow is seen seated nearby, laughing heartily at the man's exaggerated reactions. Dramatic, high-pitched sound effects, including a building whistle and a loud "Zaa!", punctuate the game as the man continues his dramatic display. On-screen text graphics such as '挑战成功' (Challenge Successful) and '惊不惊喜' (Surprised or not?) appear, enhancing the comedic tone. The scene shifts to a close-up of a table displaying the newly announced game elements: a bowl of noodles labeled '一碗热干面', a plush sword labeled '一把勾践剑', and a boiled egg labeled '一颗水煮蛋'. The Man with name tag '李晨' interacts with the central figure, handing over items. Participants in white outfits are seen moving around, standing, and engaging in playful banter, with multiple voices excitedly repeating the names of the new items like "勾践剑!" (Goujian sword!) and "热干面!" (Hot dry noodles!), and correcting "生鸡蛋" (raw egg) to "水煮蛋" (boiled egg). The segment concludes with a split-screen comparison of the man’s hands '玩之前' (Before Playing) and '玩之后' (After Playing), highlighting the physical impact of the challenge, as voices continue to discuss the "Goujian sword."

The brightly lit studio, designed as a playful dining area with a blue 'Keep Running' backdrop and food-themed decorations, sets the scene for a lively passing game. Participants in white outfits are gathered around a wooden table, engaging in a rapid-fire identification challenge. A small white bowl labeled '一碗热干面' (a bowl of hot dry noodles), a plush sword labeled '一把勾践剑' (a sword of Goujian), and a boiled egg labeled '一颗水煮蛋' are central props. Throughout the game, multiple male and female voices are heard in quick succession, repeatedly asking "是什么?" (What is it?) and identifying the items as "勾践剑", "热干面", and humorously, both "生鸡蛋" (raw egg) and "水煮蛋" (boiled egg), despite the visual label. The Man in the white shirt (center focus) reacts with exaggerated discomfort and laughter, especially after receiving the red chili pepper, his hands shown in close-up. He playfully threatens, "你再说，我就刺死你，来" (If you say that again, I'll stab you, come on), eliciting more laughter and gong sounds. The Woman with dark hair, labeled '孟指导上线', actively leads the commentary, her voice heard stating, "我们都下两轮了" (We've already gone two rounds), "你没看嘛，人家刚才玩一遍了" (Didn't you see? They just played a round), and critiquing, "你刚不对" (You were wrong just now), and "我要问你这是什么，你没理我" (I asked you what this was, and you ignored me). She also offers advice: "其实你不用管他理不理你，姐，你记住下一个是啥就行了" (Actually, you don't need to care if he pays attention to you, sis, just remember what the next one is). The Man with name tag '李晨' participates, handing over props and laughing, and is heard asserting, "我说了勾践剑" (I said Goujian sword). The Woman with blonde hair and bow laughs heartily at the reactions. Background participants eat and react with amusement, contributing to the dynamic atmosphere. On-screen text graphics like '挑战成功' (Challenge Successful) and '惊不惊喜' (Surprised or not?) enhance the comedic tone, while a split-screen comparison graphic highlights the messy outcome on the man's hands. The game continues with a slower, more deliberate identification of the items, punctuated by laughter and playful banter, including a male voice suggesting, "好，咱们再倒退一下，慢点啊" (Okay, let's rewind a bit, slowly).

The segment opens in a brightly lit studio, resembling a casual dining area with a blue 'Keep Running' backdrop and city silhouettes. Participants in white outfits are engaged in a lively passing game at wooden tables, involving a small white bowl of hot dry noodles, a red chili pepper, a plush sword labeled '一把勾践剑' (a sword of Goujian), and a boiled egg. The atmosphere is filled with laughter and playful banter. A male voice asks '是什么?' (What is it?), followed by another male voice declaring '这是一颗水煮蛋' (This is a boiled egg). The Man in white shirt (center focus) reacts with exaggerated discomfort and laughter upon receiving the red chili pepper, with a male voice commenting '你是反拍啊!' (You're off-beat!) and '节奏问题啊!' (Rhythm problem!). The Woman with dark hair, labeled '孟指导上线', actively leads the commentary, questioning the game's rules and rhythm, asking '等一下, 我想知道他给我这个勾践剑的时候我应该说什么?' (Wait, I want to know what I should say when he gives me this Goujian sword?) and '怎么能再节奏里?' (How can it be in rhythm?). The Man with name tag '李晨' actively participates, counting '5, 6, 7, 8' and suggesting '我想想, 我想个办法' (Let me think, I'll find a way). The game intensifies with rapid call-and-response, as multiple voices chant '这是一把勾践剑!' (This is a Goujian sword!) and '这是一颗水煮蛋!' (This is a boiled egg!), interspersed with '是什么?'. The Man in white shirt exclaims '完了, 我这... 谁给抢回去了? 我抢不了!' (It's over, I... Who snatched it back? I can't snatch it!), highlighting his struggle amidst the chaos. The Woman with blonde hair and bow laughs heartily in close-up shots, while other participants in the background contribute to the energetic tone with laughter and movement. On-screen text graphics like '挑战成功' (Challenge Successful) and '惊不惊喜' (Surprised or not?) narrate the game's progression. A Split-Screen Comparison visually emphasizes the messiness on the man’s hands before and after the game. The game concludes with a countdown and a final rapid exchange, including '热干面!' (Hot dry noodles!).

The video unfolds in a brightly lit, game-show studio where participants in matching white outfits are engaged in a lively passing game. The central focus is on a man in a white shirt who reacts with exaggerated expressions of discomfort and laughter as he receives a red chili pepper. The game involves props like a white bowl labeled '一碗热干面' (a bowl of hot dry noodles), a plush sword labeled '一把勾践剑' (a sword of Goujian), and a boiled egg labeled '一颗水煮蛋' (a boiled egg). The segment opens with rapid-fire chanting of the item names like "水煮蛋," "热干面," and "勾践剑," interspersed with the question "这是什么?" (What is this?), setting an energetic tone. A woman with dark hair, identified by on-screen text as '孟指导上线' (Meng Director Online), actively speaks and gestures, critiquing a participant by stating, "我觉得你一开始不是听我的，你太心急了" (I think you didn't listen to me at first, you were too impatient), and advising, "咱们一开始节奏控制的慢一点，这样会好一点" (Let's control the pace slower at the beginning, that way it will be better). The man in the center, reacting to the chili, acknowledges, "我心急了" (I was impatient). A male voice, possibly Li Chen, suggests, "咱们陈哥，来一个慢的" (Our Brother Chen, let's do a slow one). A woman with blonde hair and a bow watches from the side, laughing heartily, while other participants in the background cheer and react with amusement. On-screen text graphics such as '挑战成功' (Challenge Successful) and '惊不惊喜' (Surprised or not?) narrate the game. The segment culminates in an energetic call-and-response, with a male voice initiating "这是一把勾践剑" and "这是一颗水煮蛋," and the group enthusiastically chanting "勾践剑" and "水煮蛋" in response, accompanied by lively background music and cheering. A split-screen comparison visually highlights the messiness of the challenge on the man’s hands, labeled '玩之前' (Before Playing) and '玩之后' (After Playing), reinforcing the humorous and energetic tone of the 'Keep Running' branded show.

The segment opens with a burst of comedic sound effects and loud laughter as participants in matching white outfits engage in a lively passing game around a wooden table in a brightly lit studio. The man in the center reacts with exaggerated groans and laughter, his hands shown in close-up, as he receives a red chili pepper, emphasizing the messy challenge. The Woman with dark hair, labeled '孟指导上线', actively leads the commentary, her clear, directive voice initiating a rapid-fire call-and-response game where participants must identify items like the plush sword ('一把勾践剑'), the bowl of hot dry noodles ('一碗热干面'), and a boiled egg ('一颗水煮蛋'). The Man with name tag '李晨' and other male participants contribute to the energetic dialogue, correcting each other and sometimes comically misidentifying items, such as calling the noodles "Wuhan noodles," which elicits more widespread laughter. The Woman with blonde hair and bow laughs heartily, her amusement evident in close-up shots. As the game progresses, the atmosphere remains highly energetic, punctuated by more comedic sound effects and continuous laughter from the group. On-screen text graphics like '挑战成功' (Challenge Successful) and '惊不惊喜' (Surprised or not?) reinforce the humorous tone. The Woman with dark hair comments that the game is "very difficult," while the Man in the center initially claims it's "very simple," only to retract his statement amidst further laughter and sound effects, as a split-screen comparison highlights the physical impact on his hands.

The minute opens in a brightly lit studio, where participants in white outfits are gathered around a wooden table under the 'Keep Running' logo, creating a playful and energetic atmosphere filled with laughter. A female voice, identified by on-screen text as '孟指导上线' (Meng Director Online), remarks, "这是我玩过最高端的游戏。我都有点读不明白。" (This is the most high-end game I've ever played. I'm a bit confused.), followed by a male voice lamenting, "坏了，我们可能离不开武汉了。" (Oh no, we might not be able to leave Wuhan now.). The 'Meng Director' then asks for a slower pace, "你慢一点. 我这个有点读不明白，你慢一点," to which another male voice responds, "你按照你的节奏来，我们配合你。" (You go at your own pace, we'll cooperate with you.). The scene then transitions into a fast-paced passing game involving a small white bowl of noodles, a red chili pepper, a plush sword, and a boiled egg. The central man in a white shirt reacts with exaggerated discomfort and amusement, especially when handling the chili pepper, while the Woman with blonde hair and bow laughs heartily in close-up. A male voice counts down "3, 2, 1, 走!", initiating a rapid-fire call-and-response game. Participants, including the Man with name tag '李晨' who is seen handing items, repeatedly shout "这是一把勾践剑!" (This is a Goujian Sword!) or "这是一碗热干面!" (This is a bowl of Hot Dry Noodles!) followed by a chorus of "是什么?" (What is it?), with on-screen text graphics like '热干面' and '勾践剑' appearing to match the spoken words. The game intensifies, with the introduction of "这是一颗水煮蛋!" (This is a Boiled Egg!) into the frantic exchange, accompanied by an upbeat, playful background music and continuous overlapping shouts and laughter, culminating in a lively and comedic shared moment.

event_blocks.summary: In a brightly lit studio for 'Keep Running', participants in white outfits engaged in a passing game involving a Bowl of Hot Dry Noodles, a Plush Sword, a Boiled Egg, and a Red Chili Pepper, accompanied by rhythmic chanting of "勾践剑" and on-screen text graphics. After a successful challenge, the game shifted to identifying new props: a green plush cactus, a white power bank, and a rolled dough stick, with rapid-fire questioning and identification by multiple voices, including the Woman with dark hair and the Woman with blonde hair, and playful interactions from the Man with name tag '李晨' and the Man in white shirt (center focus). The challenge involved a rule clarification that success required items to 'pop/overflow', leading to a re-challenge. Subsequently, a 'Keep Running Marathon Relay Race' scoreboard was revealed, where the Man with name tag '李晨' and another male participant used a yellow measuring tape and pink flower stickers to determine segment distances, excitedly announcing '500m' for position 1 and '1000m' for position 10, while expressing nervousness about the segment allocations. The segment concluded with a full-screen graphic detailing the 13km marathon relay race, with an authoritative male voiceover stating that all opportunities to obtain track information were exhausted, requiring participants to infer the remaining distances.

Bowl of Hot Dry Noodles.description: A small white bowl with red and yellow trim, filled with noodles and green toppings, labeled '一碗热干面' (a bowl of hot dry noodles), central to the game setup and identified by a male voice as '你碗热干面' (your bowl of hot dry noodles).

Green Plush Cactus.description: A green, cartoonish cactus with googly eyes, placed in a brown pot, labeled '一棵仙人掌' (a cactus), introduced as a new prop in the third challenge and actively passed between participants, causing the Man in white shirt (center focus) to react with a loud scream, and later humorously referred to as "仙人宝" (fairy treasure) in the post-game commentary.

Third Group Challenge Text.description: Large on-screen text reading '第三组挑战' (Third Group Challenge), signaling a new round of the game with updated props and participants.

Red Chili Pepper.description: A small, bright red chili pepper placed on the wooden board, used as part of the game or challenge, passed between participants, causing comedic reactions when handled by the man in the center.

On-screen Text Graphics.description: Animated Chinese text such as '第1棒 500米' (Leg 1: 500m), '第10棒 1000米' (Leg 10: 1000m), and a summary graphic '未知赛段 500米×1, 1000米×1, 1500米×2' (Unknown Segments: 500m×1, 1000m×1, 1500m×2), which visually confirm the distances being discussed and reacted to by the participants.

Rolled Dough Stick.description: A beige, cylindrical rolled dough stick, labeled '一根擀面杖' (a rolling pin), introduced as a new prop in the third challenge, and chanted about by the participants.

Split-Screen Comparison.description: A visual graphic showing two overhead views of the man in the center’s hands before and after the game, labeled '玩之前' (Before Playing) and '玩之后' (After Playing), highlighting the messiness and physical impact of the challenge.

Man with name tag '李晨'.description: A man in a white shirt with a visible name tag '李晨' (Li Chen), seated at the center table, actively participating in the passing game by handing over the white power bank and green plush cactus, laughing and engaging with the central figure; he also acts as a host, humorously remarking on the "仙人宝" (fairy treasure) pun, asking "谁说仙人宝啊？" (Who said 'fairy treasure'?), and declaring "不重要，赢了" (Doesn't matter, we won), before announcing "恭喜大家挑战成功" (Congratulations everyone, challenge successful) and explaining that they "可以获得两个最终马拉松接力赛的赛段信息" (can get two segment information for the final marathon relay race), and later participates in a strategic discussion, asking "十跟一怎么样？" (How about ten and one?).

Boiled Egg.description: A plain white boiled egg labeled '一颗水煮蛋' (a boiled egg), positioned next to the plush sword and noodle bowl, serving as a simple yet comedic game element.

Man in white shirt (center focus).description: A man in a white shirt seated at a table, initially seen reacting to the game, later standing beside the scoreboard and participating in marking distances with a measuring tape and flower stickers.

Cartoon Director Character.description: An animated figure labeled '导演' (director), depicted with flames and holding a fan, appearing in a green background with the text '质疑' (doubt), symbolizing a humorous critique.

Woman with blonde hair and bow.description: Wearing a white outfit with a large bow in her hair, she is seated next to the center table, reacting with amusement and laughing heartily at the man's exaggerated reactions during the game, her face shown in close-up to highlight her enjoyment, and she exclaims "充电宝!" (Power bank!) with a laugh.

Participants in white outfits.description: A group of individuals in white clothing, including a man initially seated and later two men actively engaging with the scoreboard, using a yellow measuring tape and placing flower stickers to reveal distances. Their voices are heard discussing strategy, making predictions (e.g., '我觉得第一棒应该是一千' - I think the first leg should be 1000), expressing surprise and excitement at the revealed 500m and 1000m segments, noting the absence of 1500m segments, and conveying nervousness with phrases like '好緊張啊 bro' (So nervous, bro).

White Power Bank.description: A white rectangular power bank with a green accent, labeled '一个充电宝' (a power bank), used as a new game item in the third challenge and passed between the Man with name tag '李晨' and the Man in white shirt (center focus), and is humorously exclaimed by the Woman with blonde hair.

Plush Sword.description: A brown and beige checkered plush sword labeled '一把勾践剑' (a sword of Goujian), placed on the table as part of the game's symbolic items, which is repeatedly chanted as '勾践剑' by multiple voices in a rhythmic, almost rap-like manner.

Woman with dark hair.description: Wearing a white jacket with a name tag, she is actively speaking and gesturing, appearing to lead the commentary or critique, with on-screen text labeling her as '孟指导上线' (Meng Director Online).

Scoreboard Graphic.description: A large on-screen graphic titled '“奔跑吧”马拉松接力赛' (Keep Running Marathon Relay Race), displaying numbered positions (1–10) with distances like 1000m, 2000m, 3000m, and question marks for unknowns; it is interacted with by two men using a measuring tape and flower stickers to reveal specific distances (500m for position 1, 1000m for position 10), which are met with surprise and discussion by the participants.

Pink Flower Stickers.description: Decorative pink flower-shaped stickers placed on the scoreboard at positions 1 and 10 to indicate the revealed distances of 500m and 1000m, respectively, adding a playful visual element to the game.

Yellow Measuring Tape.description: A long, flexible yellow tape used by the two men to measure and mark distances on the scoreboard, serving as a physical tool to reveal the lengths of each relay leg.

Full-Screen Relay Race Graphic.description: A large, detailed graphic titled '《奔跑吧》13公里马拉松接力赛' (Keep Running 13km Marathon Relay Race), listing all 10 legs with known distances (e.g., 500m, 1000m, 2000m, 3000m) and question marks for unknowns. An authoritative male voiceover directly references this graphic, announcing that all opportunities to gain information have been exhausted, and remaining distances must be inferred.

raw_segments: The video segment opens with a lively game challenge in a brightly lit studio, featuring the 'Keep Running' logo. Participants in white outfits are seated at wooden tables, engaging in a passing game. The initial audio is dominated by a rhythmic, almost rap-like chanting of "勾践剑" (Goujian Sword) by multiple voices, creating an energetic atmosphere. A male voice then clearly states, "这是你碗热干面" (This is your bowl of hot dry noodles), confirming one of the props. The Man in white shirt (center focus), later identified by a male voice as "郑元会" (Zhengyuanhui) and instructed to "坐中间" (sit in the middle), reacts with exaggerated expressions as he participates. After a round, a male voice declares "OK, 挑战成功" (OK, Challenge successful) and "很完美" (Very perfect). The Woman with dark hair, labeled '孟指导上线' (Meng Director Online), actively comments and gestures, while the Woman with blonde hair and bow laughs heartily. The game involves passing a Bowl of Hot Dry Noodles, a Plush Sword (the subject of the chanting), a Boiled Egg, and a Red Chili Pepper, with on-screen text graphics narrating the action. A male voice humorously remarks, "完了，我脑子里全是勾践剑了" (It's over, my mind is full of Goujian Swords). The Split-Screen Comparison graphic highlights the messiness on the man’s hands. As the challenge progresses, a new round, '第三组挑战' (Third Group Challenge), introduces new props: a green plush cactus ('一棵仙人掌'), a white power bank ('一个充电宝'), and a rolled dough stick ('一根擀面杖'). Multiple voices, including the Woman with dark hair and the Woman with blonde hair, engage in a rapid-fire, playful debate and identification of these new props, repeatedly calling out "擀面杖", "仙人掌", and "充电宝", sometimes questioning "是什么?" (What is it?) and correcting each other on the correct measure words, like "都说棵吧" (Say 'a plant') for the cactus. The Man with name tag '李晨' (Li Chen) actively passes the props, laughing and engaging. The atmosphere remains playful and humorous, with animated on-screen text like '挑战成功' appearing, and a Cartoon Director Character briefly adding comedic critique.

The segment opens in a brightly lit, cartoonish 'Keep Running' studio, where participants in white outfits are engaged in a lively game challenge at a wooden table. The atmosphere is immediately energetic, filled with game show music and laughter. A male voice playfully announces '充电宝' (power bank) as the Man with name tag '李晨' passes a white power bank to the Man in white shirt (center focus), who reacts with exaggerated expressions. A host-like voice gives instructions, emphasizing the need to 'look left and right' and 'follow the hand' to avoid mistakes, which another participant acknowledges with 'I understand, okay.' The game then shifts into a rapid-fire identification round, with a male voice introducing props like '这是一个擀面杖' (This is a rolling pin), '这是一个充电宝' (This is a power bank), and '这是一个仙人掌' (This is a cactus). Other participants, including Li Chen and the center man, repeatedly ask '是什么?' (What is it?) and then echo the item names, often with comedic delivery, while the Woman with blonde hair and bow laughs heartily. On-screen text graphics like '充电宝', '擀面杖', and '仙人掌' appear, reinforcing the spoken words. Amidst the laughter, the center man comically misidentifies an item, exclaiming '是鸡!' (It's a chicken!), prompting another participant to question 'What the heck is this thing?' The game briefly pauses with a rule clarification, 'It only counts if it pops/overflows,' and a call to 'Challenge again,' aligning with the '重新挑战' (Re-challenge) on-screen text. The round restarts with renewed energy, the participants once again engaging in the quick-paced identification of the '擀面杖', '充电宝', and '仙人掌', all underscored by continuous laughter and game show sound effects, maintaining the vibrant and humorous tone.

The video opens in a brightly lit studio with a blue 'Keep Running' backdrop, where participants are engaged in a lively game challenge at a wooden table. A rhythmic, game-show-like background music plays as a chorus of voices repeatedly chants "是什么？擀面杖！" (What is it? Rolling pin!), then "是什么？充电宝！" (What is it? Power bank!), and "是什么？仙人掌！" (What is it? Cactus!), corresponding to the on-screen text graphics labeling the props. The Man in white shirt (center focus) is at the heart of the action, reacting with exaggerated discomfort and surprise as the Man with name tag '李晨' actively passes him various game items, including a white power bank and a green plush cactus. The Woman with blonde hair and bow laughs heartily, clearly amused by his animated expressions. As the game intensifies, the chants become faster and more chaotic, punctuated by laughter and excited shouts. The Man in white shirt lets out a loud, exaggerated scream when handling the cactus, prompting more laughter, including the Woman with blonde hair exclaiming "充电宝!" (Power bank!) with a laugh. Following the challenge, the Man with name tag '李晨' humorously remarks on the "仙人宝" (fairy treasure) pun, asking "谁说仙人宝啊？" (Who said 'fairy treasure'?) before declaring "不重要，赢了" (Doesn't matter, we won). The Man in white shirt adds "顺的" (Smoothly). The Man with name tag '李晨' then announces, "恭喜大家挑战成功" (Congratulations everyone, challenge successful), explaining that they "可以获得两个最终马拉松接力赛的赛段信息" (can get two segment information for the final marathon relay race). The scene transitions to a scoreboard graphic titled '“奔跑吧”马拉松接力赛' (Keep Running Marathon Relay Race), displaying distances, while the Man with name tag '李晨' asks "十跟一怎么样？" (How about ten and one?) and another male voice suggests "最好把俩500抽出来" (Better to draw two 500s). The overall tone remains energetic and humorous, enhanced by visual effects and text.

The video opens with a split-screen, showing a '“奔跑吧”马拉松接力赛' (Keep Running Marathon Relay Race) scoreboard on the left and a man in a white shirt reacting on the right. Playful, suspenseful music and game show sound effects accompany the scene as male voices discuss the difficulty of allocating a 500m segment and emphasize the importance of the first leg, with one participant suggesting it should be 1000m or 1500m, definitely not 500m. The scene transitions to a wider shot where two men in white shirts stand beside the scoreboard, using a yellow measuring tape and pink flower stickers to reveal distances. With exclamations of surprise and excitement, they react to the reveal of '500m' for position 1 and '1000m' for position 10, shouting "500!" and "1000!". They express nervousness, with one exclaiming "好緊張啊 bro" (So nervous, bro), and discuss the implications, noting the impossibility of two 500m legs being adjacent and that no 1500m segments have been revealed yet. On-screen text graphics confirm the revealed distances and summarize known segments: 500m × 1, 1000m × 1, 1500m × 2. The segment concludes with a full-screen graphic titled '《奔跑吧》13公里马拉松接力赛' (Keep Running 13km Marathon Relay Race), listing all 10 legs with known and unknown distances, as an authoritative male voiceover announces that all opportunities to obtain track information have been used up, and the remaining distances must now be inferred by the participants. The atmosphere remains playful with bright lighting and colorful set design.

(Power bank!) with a laugh.
